dep.name: opencv-python
dep.purpose: Video decoding (CPU), image processing, ROI tool

dep.name: httpx
dep.purpose: HTTP client for LLM API calls

dep.name: PySide6
dep.purpose: Desktop GUI framework: QMainWindow, custom widgets, QThread workers

PreferredAgentStack.preferred-gui-framework: PySide6 (Qt6) with QMainWindow, QDialog, QThread workers
PreferredAgentStack.preferred-worker-pattern: QObject worker moved to QThread with signal-based progress/result/error

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit checks for each module

phase-level.focus: Synthetic video tests with real pipeline execution

gui-testing.focus: Smoke tests for window creation, widget rendering, worker signals. Limited by headless CI constraints.
gui-testing.mocking-policy: Use QTest for widget interaction simulation. Use QSignalSpy for worker signal verification. Prefer modular tests with minimal Qt dependency where possible.

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer fakes (e.g., in-memory frame generators) over monkey-patching.

Observability.gui-tracing: QLoggingCategory for Qt debug output; route through loguru if needed
Observability.redaction: Never log file paths that may contain secrets, raw subtitle text with sensitive data, or credentials.

AutonomyPolicy.replan-trigger: Missing dependency, contradictory contract, or unclear third-party surface.

DeliveryShape.base: Local CLI tool, single Python package installed via pip, console_script entry point.
DeliveryShape.gui-option: GUI available via `pip install video-slide-md[gui]`. GUI entry point: video-slide-md-gui or python -m video_slide_md.gui.
DeliveryShape.binary-distribution: Future option: PyInstaller bundle with --gui extras for standalone .exe/.app.
